# Jeevan Rekha Foods

Jeevan Rekha is a premium cooking oil brand owned by AB Udyog Private Limited, with a 40+ year heritage in manufacturing and refining high-quality edible oils. Our refinery and manufacturing facility is located at Dighirkon, Bamunia Road, Uchallan, Burdwan – 713427, West Bengal, India. Corporate offices are in Kolkata, West Bengal.

Our core focus is promoting cardiovascular health, digestive wellness, and purity in cooking through advanced physical refining processes.

## Core Products

* **Physically Refined Rice Bran Oil** (Hero Product): 100% physically refined in our own manufacturing facility. Contains 14,000 PPM Gamma-Oryzanol, high smoking point (232°C / 450°F), and is rich in Vitamin E.
* **Premium Kacchi Ghani Mustard Oil**: Packaged and packed under strict quality control. Made from select mustard seeds, cold-pressed to retain natural pungency, antioxidants, and digestive properties.
* **Pure Soybean Oil**: Packaged and packed under strict quality control. Lightweight, light-colored, and neutral-tasting oil suitable for high-heat baking and frying.

## Key Navigation Links

* [Home](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/) - Main portal, brand value, and company overview.
* [About Us](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/about) - Outlining our 40+ years of refining heritage and physical refining technology.
* [Manufacturing Facility](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/manufacturing) - Details on our refining plant, FSSAI certifications, and physical refining science.
* [All Cooking Oils](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/products) - Product comparison guide and detail listings.
* [Rice Bran Oil Product Page](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/products/rice-bran-oil) - Details, smoke point comparisons, and chemical analysis.
* [Mustard Oil Product Page](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/products/mustard-oil) - Pungency, extraction details, and packaging info.
* [Soybean Oil Product Page](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/products/soybean-oil) - Smoke point, light frying properties, and baking suitability.
* [Blogs & Articles](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/blogs) - Health insights, debunked cooking myths, and recipes.
* [Contact Us](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/contact) - Contact channels, bulk inquiry forms, and location maps.
* [Pricing Information](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/pricing.md) - Details on available packaging sizes and commercial purchase channels.
* [Diwali Sweets & Savouries Recipe](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/blogs/recipes/8-authentic-diwali-recipes-sweets-savouries-with-heart-healthy-rice-bran-oil) - 8 authentic Diwali recipes.
* [Diwali Delights Recipe](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/blogs/recipes/diwali-delights-the-golden-touch-of-rice-bran-oil-in-festive-cooking) - Rice Bran Oil in festive cooking.
* [Indian Evening Snacks Recipe](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/blogs/recipes/indian-evening-snacks-rice-bran-oil) - Easy evening snacks.
* [Potoler Dorma Recipe](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/blogs/recipes/potoler-dorma) - Traditional Bengali stuffed pointed gourd.
* [Shorshe Ilish Recipe](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/blogs/recipes/shorshe-ilishi) - Traditional Hilsa fish in mustard gravy.
* [Cholar Daal and Luchi Recipe](https://jeevanrekhafoods.com/blogs/recipes/cholar-daal-and-luchi) - Classic Bengali breakfast.
